metadata.name: js
metadata.description: JavaScript compiler. Compiles JS source into runtime Fns. new Function-backed today; future JS-to-wasm pipeline swaps the body.
Bootstrap switch. JS compilation is in-process and instant, so this is trivially true. Reserved for symmetry with worker-backed kinds.
Runtime-ready sentinel. Always true for the in-process JS compiler.
Catastrophic-death sentinel. Main-thread kinds never die.
Append-only log of CelError values produced by js lambdas. v1: empty array.
